---
title: "Interested in my High Energy Physics Work: See My Google Scholar Page"
date: '2015-01-01'
author: [Jake Searcy]
publication: Atlas Collaboration
categories: []
url_source: 'https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Bgzrdc8AAAAJ&hl=en'
url_preprint: ''
journ: Various
issue: null
page: ''
year: Various
image: ''
pub_number: 1
---
